---
title: "Events"
---

## **Check back soon for 2026 CNC events!!**

Click on an event to learn more/RSVP(RSVP not required, but is appreciated)

| Time | April 24 | April 25 | April 26 | April 27 |
|--------------|----------------|----------------|--------------|--------------|
| 8 am |  |  |  |  |
| 9 am |  |  |  |  |
| 10 am |  |  |  |  |
| 11 am |  | Mycology Walk |  |  |
| 12 pm |  |  |  |  |
| 1 pm |  |  | Hawk Watch |  |
| 2 pm |  |  |  |  |
| 3 pm |  |  |  |  |
| 4 pm | Stream Macroinvertebrates with MCCD |  | Lilly Pond Trail Observation Walk |  |
| 5 pm |  |  |  |  |
| 6 pm |  | Bog Macroinvertebrates |  |  |
| 7 pm |  |  |  |  |
| 8 pm |  | Night Ecology: Moths and Amphibians |  |  |
